response: reality the general term of the sequence {a_n} is given as a_n = n - 1, and the sequence {b_n} is a geometric sequence with first term 1 and common ratio 2. reality the sequence {b_n} is defined as b_n = 2^{n-1}. reality the sum a_{b_1} + a_{b_2} + ... + a_{b_9} requires calculating the values of a for n = b_1 to b_9. reality each term a_{b_k} is calculated using the formula a_n = n - 1. reality the value of b_1 is 2^{1-1} = 2^0 = 1. reality the value of b_2 is 2^{2-1} = 2^1 = 2. reality the value of b_3 is 2^{3-1} = 2^2 = 4. reality the value of b_4 is 2^{4-1} = 2^3 = 8. reality the value of b_5 is 2^{5-1} = 2^4 = 16. reality the value of b_6 is 2^{6-1} = 2^5 = 32. reality the value of b_7 is 2^{7-1} = 2^6 = 64. reality the value of b_8 is 2^{8-1} = 2^7 = 128. reality the value of b_9 is 2^{9-1} = 2^8 = 256. reality the sum a_{b_1} + a_{b_2} + ... + a_{b_9} is calculated by substituting each b_k into the formula a_n = n - 1. reality each term is n - 1 where n is the value of b_k. reality the sum is 1 - 1 + 2 - 1 + 4 - 1 + 8 - 1 + 16 - 1 + 32 - 1 + 64 - 1 + 128 - 1 + 256 - 1. reality the final result is 1 - 1 + 2 - 1 + 4 - 1 + 8 - 1 + 16 - 1
